# [[firebase|Firebase]] Studio

> AI Registry entry [AIR-31](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-31/firebase-studio) — status **Production** as of 2026-05-04. Departments: —.

**Category:** App Development Platform / Backend-as-a-Service (BaaS)
**Cost per User/Month:** Free (Spark plan); Pay-as-you-go (Blaze plan)
**Departments:** Technology

## Overview

Google's comprehensive app development platform — backend-as-a-service for building, deploying, and scaling apps. Suite of managed backend services: databases, auth, hosting, serverless functions, analytics. Tightly integrated with [[google-cloud|Google Cloud]] Platform ([[google-cloud|AIR-7]]).

## Capabilities

* Cloud Firestore — Scalable NoSQL with real-time sync
* Realtime Database — JSON-based real-time data sync
* Authentication — Managed identity, OAuth, MFA
* Cloud Functions — Serverless compute
* Hosting — Static/dynamic content, global CDN
* Cloud Storage — File storage
* Analytics — Google Analytics integration
* Crashlytics, Performance Monitoring
* Remote Config — Feature flags, A/B testing
* Cloud Messaging (FCM) — Push notifications
* ML Kit
* Extensions marketplace

## Security & Compliance

* Inherits Google Cloud compliance (SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA with BAA)
* Firebase Security Rules — fine-grained access control
* App Check — protects from abuse
* Configurable data residency
* IAM integration

## Relevance to Janus Digital

Managed backend infrastructure to accelerate internal tool development. Fits naturally into existing Google ecosystem (shared billing, IAM, compliance). Serverless architecture relevant for lightweight internal tools and automations.

*Currently in Sandbox. Functional tier. Technology team evaluation.*
